Parameter.name: Patlist
Parameter.descriptions: Patlist to execute.

Parameter.name: ChainPatlist
Parameter.descriptions: ChainPatlist to execute.

Parameter.name: DportPatlist
Parameter.descriptions: DportPatlist to execute.

Parameter.name: TimingsTc
Parameter.descriptions: TimingsTc for plist execution.

Parameter.name: LevelsTc
Parameter.descriptions: LevelsTc for plist execution.

Parameter.name: EnableScanPatLookUp
Parameter.descriptions: Option to disable pattern lookup when it was not disabled through uservar.

Parameter.name: EnableReadingLabels
Parameter.descriptions: Option to enable/disable previous label reading and associated cycle count.

Parameter.name: TotalFailCaptureCount
Parameter.descriptions: Number of Patlist execution failures to capture per plist.

Parameter.name: PerPatFailCaptureCount
Parameter.descriptions: Number of Patlist execution failures to capture per pattern. The minimal number is 1.

Parameter.name: PatternsRegexesForKill
Parameter.descriptions: PatternsRegexesForKill. When one of the failing patterns, matching one of the regexes, test method will exit from dedicated port 4.\nExample: \".*pre.*, Pattern.*\

Parameter.name: PartitionsToIgnore
Parameter.descriptions: PartitionsToIgnore. When one of the failing partition matches one of this paritions, the test method will print 9 on the HRY string.

Parameter.name: ExpectedPartitionsStatuses
Parameter.descriptions: ExpectedPartitionsStatuses.Comma-separated values of \"PartitionName=0/1/8/9/X\" (X - don't care.)\nExample: \"EXE=1, FID=X, OOO=0\

Parameter.name: SetUnassignedToUntestedPatterns
Parameter.descriptions: SetUnassignedToUntestedPatterns. If TRUE the HRY will be overriden with UNASSIGNED for those partitions that not reported failures.

Parameter.name: MaskPins
Parameter.descriptions: Comma separated pins for mask.

Parameter.name: HRYInputFile
Parameter.descriptions: HRY generation rules input file.

Parameter.name: ChainHRYInputFile
Parameter.descriptions: Chain HRY generation rules input file.

Parameter.name: PinMappingFile
Parameter.descriptions: Pin mapping input file

Parameter.name: SharedStorageHRYExportKey
Parameter.descriptions: SharedStorageHRYExportKey. This key will be used to export the HRY to shared storage under IP scope. \nThe key will be reset in all cases at beginning of execution with empty string. In case of failure, nothing will be written afterwards.

Parameter.name: HPTPMode
Parameter.descriptions: HPTPEnableOption. If ENABLE, test method shall use HPTP algorithm to decode the bit position. Otherwise, normal SSN algorithm is used.

Parameter.name: ApplyEndSequence
Parameter.descriptions: ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

Parameter.name: PrePlist
Parameter.descriptions: PrePlist callback to plist execution.

Parameter.name: GenerateSpofi
Parameter.descriptions: GenerateSpofi. Enable will allow Atpg, Chain, Dport SPOFI to be generated.

Parameter.name: EnableSpofiPartitionName
Parameter.descriptions: EnableSpofiPartitionName. If enabled, partition name will be calculated and print into SPOFI log.

Parameter.name: IfeObject
Parameter.descriptions: The IFE object of type IScanHRYExtensions.

Parameter.name: VectorCountOffset
Parameter.descriptions: Option to add an offset to the cycle count. Default is 0.

ExitPort.PortDescriptions: PASS PORT - ATPG FUNCTIONAL TEST PASS
PASS PORT - CHAIN FUNCTIONAL TEST PASS
SINGLE ATPG or CHAIN FUNCTIONAL TEST FAIL
PASS PORT - DPORT FUNCTIONAL TEST PASS
FAIL PORT - DPORT FUNCTIONAL TEST FAIL
PORT FAIL FOR SW ERROR CONDITION
PORT FAIL FOR HW ALARM CONDITION
